title: 風紀委員長賞、受賞者ですから

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One morning at a school assembly...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O, you are being recognized this
month for setting a good example for the other
students!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
To name just a few instances, you greeted
everyone heartily in the morning, were never late,
paid attention in class, and always had all your
things with you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
As such, we're giving you the Disciplinary
Committee Chairman's Award! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We hope you will continue to be a fine role model
and a paragon of discipline!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! It feels nice to be praised. Talk about
motivation!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Even Bamboo has high hopes for me! I'm going to
keep doing my best to protect the peace of the
academy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Booooom!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Gyah! Was that an explosion?! Hang on... There's
smoke coming from that classroom!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You! Stop right there!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, well, well. You arrived quicker than I
expected, but do you think you can capture me?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I have indeed failed in the past, so I will
admit I have my doubts!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Th-this looks like a job for me, the winner of the
Disciplinary Committee Chairman's Award!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But what exactly can I do to help? Uh... Um...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: J-j-jump right in?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hang on, what am I hesitating for? I won the
Disciplinary Committee Chairman's Award this
month. I'm sure I can do this if I try!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Haaahhh! Chiyono O to the rescuuuue!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O takes a flying leap of faith and
safely secures Agnes Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Nice! You weren't the winner of the award for
nothing!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right, Tachyon! You're not gettin' out of
writing an apology essay this time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Fine, fine! I'll concede to you today and write
one.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's that?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: What's what?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That flickering in the sky. Do you not see what
appears to be a glinting light up there?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hm? I don't see anything...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wait, is that it? There's some kind of twinkling
light over there...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Isn't that just the sun reflecting off the windows?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're right! It is. Hahaha. Sorry!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O & Bamboo
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I-I can't believe it! She got me again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon gives them the slip several more
times after that, but they eventually manage to
nab her.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: W-wait, like they do in battles and stuff?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hang on, what am I hesitating for? I won the
Disciplinary Committee Chairman's Award this
month. I'm sure I can do this if I try!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, they both give chase after Agnes
Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Y-you're not getting through me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh my, it appears I've been cornered!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Good job, Chiyono O! All right, Tachyon! Give it
up! You're not getting away today!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: We've got you now! You can't run anymore!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, let's all calm down! I'll make us some
tea, so let's talk this out!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It is vital to discuss things. After all, this could be
a misunderstanding. You can't just blame people
for crimes willy-nilly, right?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Well, uh... Yeah, I guess that's true!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A wise decision. Now wait here while I fetch some
tea leaves.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Okay! We'll be waiting!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Like she said, it's important to hash things out
first! Just catching the culprit isn't the only job of
the disciplinary committee!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Talking things out will be much more
productive!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
...She certainly is taking a long time, though.
Maybe she can't find the tea.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Is finding tea really this time-consuming?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm not sur—wait.

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O & Bamboo
text_block_list.text: Ahhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, the academy is thrown into chaos
again, and it isn't until the sun is setting that they
finally catch Agnes Tachyon.
